TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Li-i-syu, title = Li-i-syu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Li-i-syu} }

S.FORM: Li-i-syu (u sulit nu Hulam: śĚéśėďšŅģ; PeŐćh-Ňće-jńę: L√≠ EŐćk-siu, 1988.6.10) nalecuhan i Taywan Takaw Sanmin. u saupu pahusuay palaway telungay ku šł≠ŚúčŚĽ£śí≠ťõĽŚŹį, YouTuber. u saupu kasedan ku . u sapuyaay a kakuniza === u kawaw niza ===
S.PHON: r~…ĺi-i-sju (u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***; p…ô*ńß-*…ô-j*: r~…ĺ* …ô*k-siu, ****.*.**) nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i tajwan takaw sanmin. u saupu pańßusuaj par~…ĺawaj t…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj ku ******, joutub…ôr. u saupu kas…ôdan ku . u sapujaaj a kakuniza === u kawaw niza ===
S.FORM: Li-i-syu (u sulit nu Hulam: śĚéśėďšŅģ; PeŐćh-Ňće-jńę: L√≠ EŐćk-siu, 1988.6.10) nalecuhan i Taywan Takaw Sanmin. u saupu pahusuay palaway telungay ku šł≠ŚúčŚĽ£śí≠ťõĽŚŹį, YouTuber. u saupu kasedan ku . u sapuyaay a kakuniza === u kawaw niza ===
